title: [DSP-7955 1/2] Implement DAG cycle detection/resolution, additional context for error messages
description:
There are a few other miscellaneous small fixes here:

* prevent timeouts/failed jobs from showing PASSED status
* add failure reason metadata to dynamodb events table to pass that context back to the cli

Example new notifications:

multiple cycles:

![Screenshot 2026-04-02 at 11.18.31 AM.png](/uploads/a67bff4d147a36b9377951a2711857ad/Screenshot_2026-04-02_at_11.18.31_AM.png){width=620 height=101}

single cycle:

![Screenshot 2026-04-02 at 11.17.34 AM.png](/uploads/266bc1bf6df3ea89863a5bdf0ac7e8fd/Screenshot_2026-04-02_at_11.17.34_AM.png){width=467 height=83}

DAG registration failure (rare, but could be caused by any number of reasons)

![Screenshot 2026-04-02 at 11.18.09 AM.png](/uploads/03178871eaa5c28d8d8bd38b9f3d4bbb/Screenshot_2026-04-02_at_11.18.09_AM.png){width=468 height=57}

Closes DSP-7955

diffs.diff:
@@ -87,6 +87,7 @@ class SeijiDeploymentAirflow(object):
     refresh_deployed: bool = attr.ib(default=False, kw_only=True)
     operation: str = attr.ib(default='run', kw_only=True)
     timestamps: bool = attr.ib(default=False, kw_only=True)
+    fix_dag_cycle: bool = attr.ib(default=False, kw_only=True)
 
     @property
     def show_timestamps(self) -> bool:
@@ -270,6 +271,7 @@ class SeijiDeploymentAirflow(object):
             terraform_cache_lock=self.terraform_cache_lock,
             refresh_deployed=self.refresh_deployed,
             operation=self.operation,
+            fix_dag_cycle=self.fix_dag_cycle,
         )
 
         if self.debug:
@@ -336,6 +338,17 @@ class SeijiDeploymentAirflow(object):
             LOGGER.info(f"Error retrieving deployment status from DynamoDB: {str(e)}")
             return None
 
+    def check_deployment_details(self):
+        dynamodb_client = self.get_dynamodb_client()
+        table_name = f"{self.label}-adt-event-state"
+        try:
+            response = dynamodb_client.get_item(TableName=table_name, Key={'event_uuid': {'S': self.event_uuid}})
+            if 'Item' in response and 'details' in response['Item']:
+                return response['Item']['details']['S']
+        except ClientError as e:
+            LOGGER.debug(f"Error retrieving deployment details: {e}")
+        return None
+
     def delete_dynamodb_entry(self):
         """Delete an entry from the DynamoDB table based on event_uuid."""
         dynamodb_client = self.get_dynamodb_client()
@@ -432,11 +445,14 @@ class SeijiDeploymentAirflow(object):
 
         signal.signal(signal.SIGINT, signal_handler)
 
+        self.deployment_status = None
+
         with yaspin(text="Looking for logs ...", color="cyan") as spinner:
             spinner_ref = spinner
             while not deployment_complete and (time.time() - start_time < timeout) and not panic:
                 status = self.check_deployment_status()
-                if status in ["SUCCESS", "FAILED_MAX_RETRIES", "EXCLUDED"]:
+                if status in ["SUCCESS", "FAILED", "FAILED_MAX_RETRIES", "DAG_CYCLE", "EXCLUDED"]:
+                    self.deployment_status = status
                     if status == "EXCLUDED":
                         self.excluded = True
                     deployment_complete = True
@@ -451,6 +467,9 @@ class SeijiDeploymentAirflow(object):
                     if logs_active:
                         logs_active = False
 
+            if not deployment_complete:
+                self.deployment_status = 'TIMEOUT'
+
             signal.signal(signal.SIGINT, signal.SIG_DFL)
 
     def get_ready_pods(self, v1, namespace, label_selector):
@@ -627,6 +646,20 @@ class SeijiDeploymentAirflow(object):
                 LOGGER.info(f'\033[91m\nRecommended Actions: \n{failed_components_formatted}\033[0m')
         elif self.excluded:
             self.print_in_box('All components in event are excluded via airflow_cd.exclusions', color_code="\033[33m")
+        elif getattr(self, 'deployment_status', None) == 'DAG_CYCLE':
+            self.deployment_status_code = 1
+            details = self.check_deployment_details()
+            self.print_in_box("DAG failed to register — dependency cycle detected", color_code="\033[91m")
+            if details:
+                LOGGER.info(f'\033[91m{details}\033[0m')
+            LOGGER.info('\033[33mFix the luna-dependencies.yaml in the packages above to remove the '
+                        'circular reference.\033[0m')
+        elif getattr(self, 'deployment_status', None) == 'FAILED':
+            self.deployment_status_code = 1
+            self.print_in_box("DAG failed to register — check Slack for details", color_code="\033[91m")
+        elif getattr(self, 'deployment_status', None) == 'TIMEOUT':
+            self.deployment_status_code = 1
+            self.print_in_box("Deployment timed out waiting for status", color_code="\033[91m")
         else:
             self.print_in_box("All components deployed successfully!", color_code="\033[92m")

@@ -208,6 +208,13 @@ NO_CACHE_OPTION = typer.Option(
     show_default=True
 )
 
+FIX_DAG_CYCLE_OPTION = typer.Option(
+    False,
+    '--fix-dag-cycle',
+    help='Break dependency cycle edges instead of failing DAG registration',
+    show_default=True
+)
+
 CLEANUP_OPTION = typer.Option(
     True,
     '--cleanup/--no-cleanup',
@@ -516,7 +523,8 @@ def apply(
     debug_logging: bool = DEBUG_LOGGING_OPTION,
     airflow_debug: bool = AIRFLOW_DEBUG_OPTION,
     airflow_timestamps: bool = AIRFLOW_TIMESTAMPS_OPTION,
-    no_cache: bool = NO_CACHE_OPTION
+    no_cache: bool = NO_CACHE_OPTION,
+    fix_dag_cycle: bool = FIX_DAG_CYCLE_OPTION
 ):
 
     # check principal early to get original AWS username and carry over across executions
@@ -603,6 +611,7 @@ def run(
     airflow_debug: bool = AIRFLOW_DEBUG_OPTION,
     airflow_timestamps: bool = AIRFLOW_TIMESTAMPS_OPTION,
     no_cache: bool = NO_CACHE_OPTION,
+    fix_dag_cycle: bool = FIX_DAG_CYCLE_OPTION,
     cleanup: bool = CLEANUP_OPTION,
     use_dev_cluster: bool = KUBERNETES_DEVELOPMENT_CLUSTER_OPTION,
     skip_lightswitch_check: bool = SKIP_LIGHTSWITCH_CHECK_OPTION,
@@ -787,6 +796,7 @@ def deployer_execute(
     airflow_debug: bool = False,
     airflow_timestamps: bool = False,
     no_cache: bool = False,
+    fix_dag_cycle: bool = False,
     cleanup: bool = True,
     kubernetes_dev_path: Path = None,
     use_dev_cluster: bool = False,
@@ -827,6 +837,7 @@ def deployer_execute(
                               'airflow_debug': '--airflow-debug',
                               'airflow_timestamps': '--timestamps',
                               'no_cache': '--no-cache',
+                              'fix_dag_cycle': '--fix-dag-cycle',
                               'cleanup': '--cleanup/--no-cleanup',
                               'refresh_deployed': '--refresh-deployed',
                               'script_retries': '--script-retries'}
@@ -881,7 +892,8 @@ def deployer_execute(
                                                   refresh_deployed=refresh_deployed,
                                                   script_retries=script_retries,
                                                   operation=operation,
-                                                  timestamps=airflow_timestamps)
+                                                  timestamps=airflow_timestamps,
+                                                  fix_dag_cycle=fix_dag_cycle)
 
         deployment_status_code = airflow_executor.deploy_airflow()

notes.body: enabled an automatic merge when all merge checks for 9c34bdf5a1343a9c6441d03d7d727697c09e0b51 pass
